title: Password Policy
text: Passwords must be updated every 90 days and contain at least 12 characters, including a special symbol.

title: WFH Guidelines
text: Remote work requests require manager approval. Core working hours are between 10:00 AM and 4:00 PM EST.

title: Git Branching Strategy
text: All new features must branch off 'develop'. Main branches are protected and require a minimum of two peer reviews before merging.
